response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates an exceptional fit for the Senior Fullstack Developer role, with over 12 years of relevant experience, deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, and a strong track record in full-stack development, AI-agent infrastructure, and enterprise tooling. His contributions to open-source projects, leadership in workshops, and alignment with the required technical stack make him a standout candidate.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (12+ years) with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and modern frameworks like Nest.js
Proven leadership in AI-agent development and internal tooling, aligning with the role's focus on automation and innovation
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement, demonstrating technical depth and collaboration skills
concerns: Limited explicit mention of cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) or containerization (Kubernetes) in recent roles
Experience with Kotlin/Java is present but not emphasized in recent positions
German language proficiency is basic, which may impact communication in a Berlin-based team
